seo_title: How Google Beam Improves Group Meetings with True-to-Life Video…
meta_description: Google Beam's new experiment brings better group meetings to users, facilitating a stronger sense of social connection and increased ability to contribute to…
body_html:
Google Beam's new experiment brings better group meetings to users, facilitating a stronger sense of social connection and increased ability to contribute to conversations.

True-to-life video communication with spatial audio Participants joining from non-Beam devices appear in true size Optimization happens automatically across more devices

50% stronger sense of social connection Facilitated by Google Beam's true-to-life video communication platform

21% increase in reported ability to contribute to conversations Due to improved hybrid meeting experiences on Google Beam

Partnerships and Future Work Google Workspace and Zoom are being integrated with Google Beam to elevate meetings today.

source.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
source.summary: Google has introduced a new experiment aimed at improving group meetings, specifically those held via its video conferencing platform, Google Meet (previously known as Google Hangouts). The update allows for more efficient collaboration by enabling smaller groups to meet simultaneously, with the option to have two in-person participants and three remote participants. This change is part of Google's ongoing efforts to enhance user experience and productivity within its communication tools.
